findings.title: Package name contains duplicate hierarchy
findings.description: Package declaration contains redundant path: 'dev.robocode.tankroyale.server.dev.robocode.tankroyale.server.core' instead of just 'dev.robocode.tankroyale.server.core'.
findings.fix: Correct the package declaration to remove the duplicate 'dev.robocode.tankroyale.server' segment.
